CustomProperties.Name: LineStopped
CustomProperties.Tooltip: True when line is stopped due to a failure - controls RESUME button state

CustomProperties.Name: OnEndProductionPressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Fires when END PRODUCTION is pressed

CustomProperties.Name: OnLogFailurePressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Fires when LOG FAILURE is pressed - also records line stop timestamp

CustomProperties.Name: OnLogWeighSamplePressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Fires when LOG WEIGH SAMPLE is pressed

CustomProperties.Name: OnResumeLinePressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Fires when RESUME LINE is pressed - records resume timestamp to calculate downtime

CustomProperties.Name: OnUpdateRejectsPressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Fires when UPDATE REJECTS is pressed

CustomProperties.Name: OnUpdateUnitsPressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Fires when UPDATE UNITS is pressed

CustomProperties.Name: OnViewJobInfoPressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Fires when VIEW JOB INFO is pressed

CustomProperties.Name: OnViewOperatorsPressed
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Fires when VIEW OPERATORS is pressed

CustomProperties.Name: SecondsRemaining
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Seconds remaining until next weigh check - drive this from a Timer on the screen

CustomProperties.Name: WeighCheckSeconds
CustomProperties.Tooltip: Countdown interval in seconds between weigh checks (default 900 = 15 min)

Rules.InvariantScript: If(LiveProduction.SecondsRemaining <= 0, "WEIGH CHECK DUE NOW", "NEXT WEIGH CHECK IN")
